subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! While calamities and tribulations, like unto the waves of the sea, surge from every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در حالتیکه مصائب و بلا مانند امواج دریا از هر طرف در هجوم با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
